page_metadata.biotools__summary: Famdenovo is a pedigree-based prediction model identifies carriers of deleterious de novo mutations in families with Li-Fraumeni syndrome. Famdenovo is an algorithm that calculates the probability of de novo status in deleterious germline mutations using family history data.
